description: 驾驶习惯评分：效率（温度+空调补偿）、平稳（加速度 m/s² 判定，去除车型依赖）、速度（严重度加权）、能量回收（按平均车速动态加权）。综合分按场景（城市/混合/高速）自适应权重 + 按里程加权汇总。

panels.title: 综合评分
panels.description: 按行程场景自适应权重（城市：平稳40+回收30+速度10+效率20；混合：30/20/20/30；高速：20/20/30/30），所有行程按里程加权平均

targets.rawSql:
WITH pos_raw AS (
  SELECT p.drive_id, p.speed, p.power, d.distance, d.start_date,
    (LEAD(p.speed) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.speed) / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(p.date) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.date)), 0) / 3.6 AS accel_ms2
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 3
),
pos_scores AS (
  SELECT drive_id, distance, start_date,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - SUM(GREATEST(0, ABS(accel_ms2) - 2.0) / 0.5) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))) AS smooth,
    LEAST(100, SUM(CASE WHEN power < 0 THEN ABS(power) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN power > 0 THEN power ELSE 0 END), 0) * GREATEST(3, AVG(speed) / 20.0)) AS regen,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - SUM(GREATEST(0, speed - 130) / 2.0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))) AS spd,
    AVG(speed) AS avg_speed
  FROM pos_raw
  GROUP BY drive_id, distance, start_date
),
drive_scores AS (
  SELECT
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - GREATEST(0, (d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km) / NULLIF(d.distance, 0) - CASE WHEN d.outside_temp_avg < 0 THEN 1.3 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg < 10 THEN 1.15 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg > 30 THEN 1.2 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg > 25 THEN 1.1 ELSE 1.0 END) * 200)) AS eff,
    COALESCE(ps.smooth, 100) AS smooth,
    COALESCE(ps.spd, 100) AS spd,
    COALESCE(ps.regen, 0) AS regen,
    COALESCE(ps.avg_speed, 50) AS avg_speed,
    d.distance
  FROM drives d
  LEFT JOIN pos_scores ps ON ps.drive_id = d.id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 3
    AND d.start_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
    AND d.end_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT ROUND(SUM((CASE WHEN avg_speed < 50 THEN smooth*0.40 + regen*0.30 + spd*0.10 + eff*0.20 WHEN avg_speed >= 80 THEN smooth*0.20 + regen*0.20 + spd*0.30 + eff*0.30 ELSE smooth*0.30 + regen*0.20 + spd*0.20 + eff*0.30 END) * distance) / NULLIF(SUM(distance), 0))::integer AS "综合评分"
FROM drive_scores

panels.title: 驾驶风格
panels.description: 纯操作风格评分（不含效率）：平稳50% + 速度30% + 回收20%，剥离温度/路况等非操作因素

targets.rawSql:
WITH pos_raw AS (
  SELECT p.drive_id, p.speed, p.power, d.distance, d.start_date,
    (LEAD(p.speed) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.speed) / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(p.date) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.date)), 0) / 3.6 AS accel_ms2
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 3
),
pos_scores AS (
  SELECT drive_id, distance, start_date,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - SUM(GREATEST(0, ABS(accel_ms2) - 2.0) / 0.5) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))) AS smooth,
    LEAST(100, SUM(CASE WHEN power < 0 THEN ABS(power) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN power > 0 THEN power ELSE 0 END), 0) * GREATEST(3, AVG(speed) / 20.0)) AS regen,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - SUM(GREATEST(0, speed - 130) / 2.0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))) AS spd,
    AVG(speed) AS avg_speed
  FROM pos_raw
  GROUP BY drive_id, distance, start_date
)
SELECT ROUND(SUM((smooth*0.50 + spd*0.30 + regen*0.20) * distance) / NULLIF(SUM(distance), 0))::integer AS "驾驶风格"
FROM pos_scores

SELECT ROUND(SUM(LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - GREATEST(0, (start_ideal_range_km - end_ideal_range_km) / NULLIF(distance, 0) - CASE WHEN outside_temp_avg < 0 THEN 1.3 WHEN outside_temp_avg < 10 THEN 1.15 WHEN outside_temp_avg > 30 THEN 1.2 WHEN outside_temp_avg > 25 THEN 1.1 ELSE 1.0 END) * 200)) * distance) / NULLIF(SUM(distance), 0))::integer AS "效率分"
FROM drives
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  AND end_date IS NOT NULL
  AND distance > 3
  AND start_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
  AND end_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL

panels.title: 平稳分
panels.description: 加速度 m/s² 激烈度加权（阈值 ±2 m/s²，超出线性累加），基于速度差直接计算，不再依赖车型功率。所有行程按里程加权。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pos_raw AS (
  SELECT p.drive_id, d.distance,
    (LEAD(p.speed) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.speed) / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(p.date) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.date)), 0) / 3.6 AS accel_ms2
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 3
),
per_drive AS (
  SELECT distance,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - SUM(GREATEST(0, ABS(accel_ms2) - 2.0) / 0.5) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))) AS smooth
  FROM pos_raw GROUP BY drive_id, distance
)
SELECT ROUND(SUM(smooth * distance) / NULLIF(SUM(distance), 0))::integer AS "平稳分"
FROM per_drive

panels.title: 速度分
panels.description: 超速严重度加权（>130 km/h 起扣，超速幅度越大扣分越多）。所有行程按里程加权。

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(spd * distance) / NULLIF(SUM(distance), 0))::integer AS "速度分"
FROM (
  SELECT d.distance,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - SUM(GREATEST(0, p.speed - 130) / 2.0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))) AS spd
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 3
  GROUP BY d.id, d.distance
) t

panels.title: 回收分
panels.description: 能量回收比 × 速度动态乘数（最低 3 倍，速度越高乘数越大）：城市 ×3，100 km/h ×5，120 km/h ×6。高速刹车少不再被扣分。所有行程按里程加权。

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(trip_regen * distance) / NULLIF(SUM(distance), 0))::integer AS "回收分"
FROM (
  SELECT d.distance,
    LEAST(100, SUM(CASE WHEN p.power < 0 THEN ABS(p.power) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN p.power > 0 THEN p.power ELSE 0 END), 0) * GREATEST(3, AVG(p.speed) / 20.0)) AS trip_regen
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 3
  GROUP BY d.id, d.distance
) t

WITH pos_raw AS (
  SELECT p.drive_id, p.speed, p.power, d.distance, d.start_date,
    (LEAD(p.speed) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.speed) / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(p.date) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.date)), 0) / 3.6 AS accel_ms2
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 3
),
pos_scores AS (
  SELECT drive_id, distance, start_date,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - SUM(GREATEST(0, ABS(accel_ms2) - 2.0) / 0.5) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))) AS smooth,
    LEAST(100, SUM(CASE WHEN power < 0 THEN ABS(power) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN power > 0 THEN power ELSE 0 END), 0) * GREATEST(3, AVG(speed) / 20.0)) AS regen,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - SUM(GREATEST(0, speed - 130) / 2.0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))) AS spd,
    AVG(speed) AS avg_speed
  FROM pos_raw
  GROUP BY drive_id, distance, start_date
),
drive_scores AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', timezone('UTC', d.start_date), '$__timezone') AS day,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - GREATEST(0, (d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km) / NULLIF(d.distance, 0) - CASE WHEN d.outside_temp_avg < 0 THEN 1.3 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg < 10 THEN 1.15 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg > 30 THEN 1.2 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg > 25 THEN 1.1 ELSE 1.0 END) * 200)) AS eff,
    COALESCE(ps.smooth, 100) AS smooth,
    COALESCE(ps.spd, 100) AS spd,
    COALESCE(ps.regen, 0) AS regen,
    COALESCE(ps.avg_speed, 50) AS avg_speed,
    d.distance
  FROM drives d
  LEFT JOIN pos_scores ps ON ps.drive_id = d.id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 3
    AND d.start_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
    AND d.end_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  day AS time,
  ROUND(SUM((CASE WHEN avg_speed < 50 THEN smooth*0.40 + regen*0.30 + spd*0.10 + eff*0.20 WHEN avg_speed >= 80 THEN smooth*0.20 + regen*0.20 + spd*0.30 + eff*0.30 ELSE smooth*0.30 + regen*0.20 + spd*0.20 + eff*0.30 END) * distance) / NULLIF(SUM(distance), 0)) AS "综合评分"
FROM drive_scores
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

WITH pos_raw AS (
  SELECT p.drive_id, p.speed, p.power, d.distance, d.start_date,
    (LEAD(p.speed) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.speed) / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(p.date) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.date)), 0) / 3.6 AS accel_ms2
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 3
),
pos_scores AS (
  SELECT drive_id, distance, start_date,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - SUM(GREATEST(0, ABS(accel_ms2) - 2.0) / 0.5) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))) AS smooth,
    LEAST(100, SUM(CASE WHEN power < 0 THEN ABS(power) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN power > 0 THEN power ELSE 0 END), 0) * GREATEST(3, AVG(speed) / 20.0)) AS regen,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - SUM(GREATEST(0, speed - 130) / 2.0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))) AS spd,
    AVG(speed) AS avg_speed
  FROM pos_raw
  GROUP BY drive_id, distance, start_date
)
SELECT
  date_trunc('day', timezone('UTC', start_date), '$__timezone') AS time,
  ROUND(SUM(smooth * distance) / NULLIF(SUM(distance), 0)) AS "平稳分",
  ROUND(SUM(spd * distance) / NULLIF(SUM(distance), 0)) AS "速度分"
FROM pos_scores
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

WITH drive_regen AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS drive_id,
    date_trunc('day', timezone('UTC', d.start_date), '$__timezone') AS day,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - GREATEST(0, (d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km) / NULLIF(d.distance, 0) - CASE WHEN d.outside_temp_avg < 0 THEN 1.3 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg < 10 THEN 1.15 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg > 30 THEN 1.2 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg > 25 THEN 1.1 ELSE 1.0 END) * 200)) AS eff_score,
    LEAST(100, SUM(CASE WHEN p.power < 0 THEN ABS(p.power) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN p.power > 0 THEN p.power ELSE 0 END), 0) * GREATEST(3, AVG(p.speed) / 20.0)) AS regen_score,
    d.distance AS drive_distance
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 3
    AND d.start_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
    AND d.end_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY d.id, d.start_date, d.start_ideal_range_km, d.end_ideal_range_km, d.distance
)
SELECT
  day AS time,
  ROUND(SUM(eff_score * drive_distance) / NULLIF(SUM(drive_distance), 0)) AS "效率分",
  ROUND(SUM(regen_score * drive_distance) / NULLIF(SUM(drive_distance), 0)) AS "回收分"
FROM drive_regen
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 行程评分明细
panels.description: 每次行程的逐项分数（同上方 KPI 同一套规则）：效率分=温度补偿后能耗；平稳分=加速度变化；速度分=>130km/h 严重度加权；回收分=回收能量÷消耗能量×动态乘数；综合分按场景权重（市区<50：平稳40+回收30+速度10+效率20；混合 50-80：30/20/20/30；高速≥80：20/20/30/30）。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pos_raw AS (
  SELECT p.drive_id, p.speed, p.power,
    (LEAD(p.speed) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.speed) / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(p.date) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.date)), 0) / 3.6 AS accel_ms2
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 3
),
pos_scores AS (
  SELECT drive_id,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - SUM(GREATEST(0, ABS(accel_ms2) - 2.0) / 0.5) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))) AS smooth_score,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - SUM(GREATEST(0, speed - 130) / 2.0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))) AS spd_score,
    LEAST(100, SUM(CASE WHEN power < 0 THEN ABS(power) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN power > 0 THEN power ELSE 0 END), 0) * GREATEST(3, AVG(speed) / 20.0)) AS regen_score,
    AVG(speed) AS avg_speed
  FROM pos_raw
  GROUP BY drive_id
)
SELECT
  to_char((d.start_date AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE '$__timezone'), 'MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "出发时间",
  ROUND(d.distance::numeric, 1) AS "距离(km)",
  d.duration_min AS "时长(分)",
  d.speed_max AS "最高速(km/h)",
  ROUND(COALESCE(ps.avg_speed, 0)::numeric, 1) AS "平均速度(km/h)",
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(ps.avg_speed, 50) < 50 THEN '城市' WHEN COALESCE(ps.avg_speed, 50) >= 80 THEN '高速' ELSE '混合' END AS "场景",
  ROUND(LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - GREATEST(0, (d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km) / NULLIF(d.distance, 0) - CASE WHEN d.outside_temp_avg < 0 THEN 1.3 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg < 10 THEN 1.15 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg > 30 THEN 1.2 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg > 25 THEN 1.1 ELSE 1.0 END) * 200))::numeric) AS "效率分",
  ROUND(COALESCE(ps.smooth_score, 100)::numeric) AS "平稳分",
  ROUND(COALESCE(ps.spd_score, 100)::numeric) AS "速度分",
  ROUND(COALESCE(ps.regen_score, 0)::numeric) AS "回收分",
  ROUND((
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(ps.avg_speed, 50) < 50 THEN
      COALESCE(ps.smooth_score, 100)*0.40 + COALESCE(ps.regen_score, 0)*0.30 + COALESCE(ps.spd_score, 100)*0.10 + LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - GREATEST(0, (d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km) / NULLIF(d.distance, 0) - CASE WHEN d.outside_temp_avg < 0 THEN 1.3 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg < 10 THEN 1.15 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg > 30 THEN 1.2 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg > 25 THEN 1.1 ELSE 1.0 END) * 200)) * 0.20
    WHEN COALESCE(ps.avg_speed, 50) >= 80 THEN
      COALESCE(ps.smooth_score, 100)*0.20 + COALESCE(ps.regen_score, 0)*0.20 + COALESCE(ps.spd_score, 100)*0.30 + LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - GREATEST(0, (d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km) / NULLIF(d.distance, 0) - CASE WHEN d.outside_temp_avg < 0 THEN 1.3 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg < 10 THEN 1.15 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg > 30 THEN 1.2 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg > 25 THEN 1.1 ELSE 1.0 END) * 200)) * 0.30
    ELSE
      COALESCE(ps.smooth_score, 100)*0.30 + COALESCE(ps.regen_score, 0)*0.20 + COALESCE(ps.spd_score, 100)*0.20 + LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - GREATEST(0, (d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km) / NULLIF(d.distance, 0) - CASE WHEN d.outside_temp_avg < 0 THEN 1.3 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg < 10 THEN 1.15 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg > 30 THEN 1.2 WHEN d.outside_temp_avg > 25 THEN 1.1 ELSE 1.0 END) * 200)) * 0.30
    END
  )::numeric) AS "综合评分"
FROM drives d
LEFT JOIN pos_scores ps ON ps.drive_id = d.id
WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
  AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
  AND d.distance > 3
  AND d.start_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
  AND d.end_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.start_date DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: 驾驶数据汇总
panels.description: 当前时间范围内的行程统计数据

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*)::integer AS "总行程数"
FROM drives
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  AND end_date IS NOT NULL
  AND distance > 1

SELECT ROUND(SUM(distance)::numeric, 0)::integer AS "总里程(km)"
FROM drives
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  AND end_date IS NOT NULL
  AND distance > 1

SELECT ROUND(AVG(distance)::numeric, 1) AS "平均行程(km)"
FROM drives
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  AND end_date IS NOT NULL
  AND distance > 1

SELECT ROUND(MAX(distance)::numeric, 1) AS "最长行程(km)"
FROM drives
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  AND end_date IS NOT NULL
  AND distance > 1

SELECT MAX(speed_max)::integer AS "最高时速(km/h)"
FROM drives
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  AND end_date IS NOT NULL
  AND distance > 1

SELECT ROUND(SUM(duration_min) / 60.0, 1) AS "总驾驶时长(h)"
FROM drives
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  AND end_date IS NOT NULL
  AND distance > 1

list.definition:
SELECT
    id as __value,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(id) OVER (PARTITION BY name) > 1 AND name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(name, ' - ', RIGHT(vin, 6)) ELSE COALESCE(name, CONCAT('VIN ', vin)) end as __text 
FROM cars
ORDER BY display_priority ASC, name ASC, vin ASC;
list.label: 车辆
list.name: car_id
list.query:
SELECT
    id as __value,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(id) OVER (PARTITION BY name) > 1 AND name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(name, ' - ', RIGHT(vin, 6)) ELSE COALESCE(name, CONCAT('VIN ', vin)) end as __text 
FROM cars
ORDER BY display_priority ASC, name ASC, vin ASC;

title: 驾驶评分
